# shadcn-svelte Component Index

_Generated from https://github.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/tree/main/docs/content/components on 2026-03-09_

The following UI components are provided by the `shadcn-svelte` library, version 1.1.1:

## Actions & selection

- [`Button`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/button.md)
- [`Button Group`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/button-group.md): grouped related actions
- [`Checkbox`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/checkbox.md)
- [`Combobox`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/combobox.md): searchable select / autocomplete
- [`Native Select`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/native-select.md): styled native `<select>`
- [`Radio Group`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/radio-group.md)
- [`Select`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/select.md)
- [`Slider`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/slider.md)
- [`Switch`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/switch.md)
- [`Toggle`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/toggle.md)
- [`Toggle Group`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/toggle-group.md): single- or multi-select set of toggles

## Forms & input structure

- [`Field`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/field.md): field wrapper for labels, hints, errors, controls
- [`Form`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/form.md): higher-level form integration / validation patterns
- [`Input`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/input.md)
- [`Input Group`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/input-group.md): input with leading/trailing addons
- [`Input OTP`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/input-otp.md): segmented one-time-code input
- [`Label`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/label.md)
- [`Textarea`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/textarea.md)

## Date & time

- [`Calendar`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/calendar.md)
- [`Date Picker`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/date-picker.md): date input built around calendar + popover
- [`Range Calendar`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/range-calendar.md): calendar for date-range selection

## Overlays & transient surfaces

- [`Alert Dialog`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/alert-dialog.md): destructive / confirm dialogs
- [`Context Menu`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/context-menu.md)
- [`Dialog`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/dialog.md)
- [`Drawer`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/drawer.md): slide-up / mobile-friendly panel
- [`Dropdown Menu`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/dropdown-menu.md)
- [`Hover Card`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/hover-card.md): preview card shown on hover/focus
- [`Popover`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/popover.md)
- [`Sheet`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/sheet.md): side panel / off-canvas panel
- [`Tooltip`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/tooltip.md)

## Navigation & disclosure

- [`Accordion`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/accordion.md)
- [`Breadcrumb`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/breadcrumb.md)
- [`Collapsible`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/collapsible.md)
- [`Command`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/command.md): command palette / searchable action list
- [`Menubar`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/menubar.md)
- [`Navigation Menu`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/navigation-menu.md)
- [`Pagination`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/pagination.md)
- [`Sidebar`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/sidebar.md)
- [`Tabs`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/tabs.md)

## Data display, layout & content

- [`Aspect Ratio`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/aspect-ratio.md)
- [`Avatar`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/avatar.md)
- [`Badge`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/badge.md)
- [`Card`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/card.md)
- [`Carousel`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/carousel.md)
- [`Chart`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/chart.md)
- [`Data Table`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/data-table.md): opinionated table patterns for sorting/filtering/etc.
- [`Item`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/item.md): generic structured item row / setting row pattern
- [`Kbd`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/kbd.md): keyboard key / shortcut rendering
- [`Resizable`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/resizable.md): split panes with draggable resize handles
- [`Scroll Area`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/scroll-area.md): custom scrollable container
- [`Separator`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/separator.md)
- [`Table`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/table.md)
- [`Typography`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/typography.md): prose / text element presets

## Feedback, status & utility

- [`Alert`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/alert.md)
- [`Empty`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/empty.md): empty-state presentation
- [`Progress`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/progress.md)
- [`Skeleton`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/skeleton.md)
- [`Sonner`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/sonner.md): toast notifications
- [`Spinner`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntabyte/shadcn-svelte/refs/heads/main/docs/content/components/spinner.md): loading indicator
